questionHtml: Draw a graph to show the variation with t of the horizontal speed v of the ball while it was in contact with the racket. Numbers are not required on the axes.
markschemeHtml:
graph must show increasing speed from an initial of zero all the time ✔
overall correct curvature ✔

meta.title: Draw a graph to show the variation with t of the horizontal speed v of the ball while it was in contact with the racket. Numbers are not required on the axes.
